info.title: sat.trackr.live API
info.description:
Public read-only HTTP API behind sat.trackr.live.

- **Catalog & TLEs** — every tracked satellite, rocket body, and debris
  object in Earth orbit (CelesTrak GP + SATCAT).
- **Launches** — upcoming + recent missions (Launch Library 2).
- **Reentries** — predicted decays (Space-Track TIP).
- **Conjunctions** — close-approach predictions (SOCRATES, refreshed 8h).
- **Space weather** — Kp / X-ray flux / R-S-G storm scales (NOAA SWPC).
- **Pass predictions** — observer-local satellite passes (SGP4 + N2YO
  visual-magnitude enrichment when within quota).
- **Stats** — operator / country / type / launch-year breakdowns.

No authentication required. Rate limits are advisory; cache-friendly
headers (`ETag`, `Cache-Control`) are emitted on every endpoint.

get.summary: Low-latency typeahead (up to 10 results)
All active close-approach predictions for a NORAD pair
get.description: Order-insensitive: /123/456 and /456/123 return the same rows.

404.description: No conjunctions found for the pair

get.summary: Upcoming SOCRATES close-approach predictions
Group metadata + member NORADs
CelesTrak constellation groups with current member counts
Bulk TLE bundle for every active satellite in a group
get.description: Hot SPA endpoint. Returns one large gzip-friendly JSON of all current TLEs for the group; designed for client-side bulk propagation. Decayed objects are filtered out.

get.summary: Full launch detail with pad metadata + associated NORADs
All launch pads currently in the catalog
Recent launches (NET in the past, ordered descending)
Reentry prediction for a single NORAD
Predicted reentries from Space-Track TIP
Full satellite metadata + inlined current TLE
List satellites (paginated, filterable, FTS-searchable)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: FTS5 fuzzy match over name / intl_designator / operator

get.summary: Observer-local pass predictions (SGP4 + optional N2YO magnitude)

200.description: Up to N upcoming passes, cached for ~6h per observer-day

get.summary: Amateur-radio transmitters from SatNOGS DB

200.description: Transmitter rows (alive-first, then by description). May be empty.

get.summary: Current TLE only (skip the metadata round-trip)

404.description: Unknown NORAD or no TLE on file

get.summary: Universal search (NORAD / intl-designator / FTS5 name fuzzy)

200.description: Up to 50 results ranked by match strength

get.summary: Trailing 24 h of SWPC samples (ascending) — feeds the trend chart
Most recent NOAA SWPC space-weather sample
Aggregated catalog breakdowns (summary / operators / countries / types / launch-years)
Upcoming launches (NET in the future, ordered ascending)

RadioTransmitter.description: Amateur-radio transmitter from SatNOGS DB (Phase 5 chunk 1)

SatelliteDetail.description: Full satellite metadata, with tle_current inlined to save a round trip

SatelliteSummary.description: Minimal satellite row returned by list endpoints

TleCurrent.description: Most-recent two-line element set for a satellite
